hero.title: Joy, |sustainably| packaged.
hero.sub: Design, manufacturing and supply-chain operations for the world's most loved gifting, toy and packaging brands — from Indonesia to the world, for more than forty years.

manifesto.title: We make the things that make |moments| — the wrap, the box, the toy, the costume — for the retailers the world trusts with its celebrations.
manifesto.body: Sansico Group is an Indonesian design and manufacturing group supplying global retail for over four decades: certified at every step, dual-sourced for resilience, and built on the belief that the objects of joy should never cost the planet.
